_note: Copy to ~/.pi/agent/router-config.json and set 'medium' and 'complex' to model IDs that exist in your models.json. _prefixed keys are ignored by the router.
_mac_mini_note: When Mac Mini is available, set complex to mac-mini/<model> to route heavy tasks off-device.
_mlx_lm_note: MLX-LM uses the same IDs as Ollama — only the backend differs in models.json
